name: Apex Sports & Entertainment
about: Apex Sports & Entertainment is a multi-sport entertainment venue featuring a comprehensive range of activities. The facility includes four indoor TrackMan golf simulator bays, an outdoor driving range, an 18-hole dinosaur-themed miniature golf course, four sand volleyball courts, and upcoming batting cages. A full-service bar offers snacks, drinks, and local brews to complement the experience. The simulators are available by reservation or walk-in, with options for individual practice, group play, and various leagues. They cater to all skill levels, from beginners to serious golfers, as well as those seeking family-friendly entertainment or corporate events.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for accurate data and a superior simulation experience
Flexible booking system allowing for both reservations and walk-ins
Ability to bring up to 6 guests per bay, making it ideal for group outings and social golf
Variety of pricing options including hourly rates and membership passes for regular players

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks available; full-service bar with food options.
Full-service bar offering a variety of canned and bottled beer, wine, and local brews.

simulator_hardware.notes: Four indoor golf simulator bays utilizing TrackMan technology.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state that clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own. Bats are available for use in the batting cages.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full-service bar that offers snacks, drinks, and local brews. Bringing outside food and drinks is not mentioned as an option.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a full 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time frame for playing a full 18 holes on a simulator. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for more detailed information on simulator usage times.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Apex Sports & Entertainment is kid-friendly. The venue features an 18-hole dinosaur-themed miniature golf course suitable for all ages and skill levels, and the golf simulators can accommodate up to 6 guests per bay.
